human_verification.notes: Reviewed gaming-specific metric-definition controls, regulator-grounded slot, sportsbook, internet-gaming, and benchmark sources, disclosure and causal-claim caveats, functionality mapping, and retained-implementation promotion limits for issue #1164.

Scenario set covers disputed metric definitions, stale or conflicting gaming data, unsupported causal and disclosure claims, generic-industry overreach, adjacent-lane routing, and tenant-specific channel adaptation.
